title: brickellia glutinosa
intro: Brickellia glutinosa, also known as Mexican brickellia or sticky brickellia, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a shrubby perennial plant with a rich history of traditional use in folk medicine, valued for its medicinal properties in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Brickellia glutinosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
